query:
UPDATE productConversions pc
JOIN products p ON p.id = pc.productId
SET pc.tenantId = p.tenantId
WHERE pc.tenantId = 1
  AND p.tenantId IS NOT NULL
  AND p.tenantId != 1;

SELECT ROW_COUNT() AS conversions_corrigidas;
